scenarios.scenario: Ambiguous mode sends an opaque reference to an unknown destination

visualEvidence.rationale: DET-02 changes deterministic matching and machine-readable recorder output, not a user interface. The real-browser boundary is retained as Cucumber and matcher reports; screenshots would not prove the matching predicate.

proofs.description: Exact, canonical transform, semantic no-match, unsupported transform, collision, lineage, and cross-run examples
Fixed-seed PROP-06 transform soundness and 4,000-case arbitrary body, header, and query false-positive corpus
Real Chromium comparison before redaction, authorized-field digest join, and raw-canary absence
Controlled unsupported opaque transform through the browser and API boundary
Unsupported transform assertion, no-positive-match guard, raw-value guard, and machine report capture
Strict whole-field matcher, deterministic IDs and hashes, complete lineage, bounded outcomes, and collision refusal
Transient authorized JSON field adapter that clears raw candidates and persists only matcher reports
Source-bound sanitized exact, URL, Base64, no-match, unsupported, and collision evidence generator
Generated all-case matcher report with fixed property corpus declaration and no raw canary values
DET-02 implementation, evidence, and claim boundary

knownLimitations: DET-02 matches only whole authorized field candidates already extracted by instrumentation; it does not scan unapproved raw payloads or infer fields semantically.

RUN-02 automatically supplies authorized JSON body fields. Query, header, and storage locations use the same typed matcher boundary, but their automatic extraction adapters are not claimed by this task.
URL_ENCODED means canonical encodeURIComponent output and BASE64 means standard padded UTF-8 Base64; unenumerated variants remain unsupported.
An opaque value cannot be proven canary-derived by this matcher. A declared unsupported transform is refused and DET-03 owns the later bounded uncertainty decision.
GitHub Actions clean-checkout verification is pending; the current account billing rejection prevents jobs from starting before checkout.
